threshold_source: e02s04 sections 14-16; no epic-level numeric test plan exists

performance.criterion: Fail-closed policy regressions complete without wall-clock timeout waits
performance.actual: 64 affected tests completed in 0.366 seconds using fake streams and timeout sources

reliability.criterion: Read-only, EOF, timeout, malformed input, and noninteractive paths create no consequential side effects
reliability.actual: Automated denial sentinels passed; user read-only UAT confirmed blocked.txt was absent

operability.criterion: CLI policy and timeout are explicit, bounded, and readable; denials remain correlated tool results
operability.actual: CLI parsing pre-network tests, safe no-prompt read-only UAT, and structured denial tests passed
